name: Cocoa Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together: flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the sugar, brown sugar, egg whites, cocoa, and cinnamon to the dry ingredients.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a lined or sprayed 9" x 13-inch pan.
5. Sprinkle the topping (remaining sugar and cinnamon) over the top of the batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool before removing from the pan.
Freezes well.
